findings.title: npm vulnerability: @langchain/core
findings.description: langsmith. Run `npm audit fix` to remediate.

findings.description: next-auth. Run `npm audit fix` to remediate.

findings.title: npm vulnerability: @next/eslint-plugin-next
findings.description: glob. Run `npm audit fix` to remediate.

findings.title: npm vulnerability: glob
findings.description: glob CLI: Command injection via -c/--cmd executes matches with shell:true. Run `npm audit fix` to remediate.

findings.title: npm vulnerability: langchain
findings.description: langsmith. Run `npm audit fix` to remediate.

findings.title: npm vulnerability: langsmith
findings.description: LangSmith Client SDK Affected by Server-Side Request Forgery via Tracing Header Injection. Run `npm audit fix` to remediate.

findings.title: npm vulnerability: next
findings.description: Next.js self-hosted applications vulnerable to DoS via Image Optimizer remotePatterns configuration. Run `npm audit fix` to remediate.

findings.title: npm vulnerability: next-auth
findings.description: nodemailer. Run `npm audit fix` to remediate.

findings.title: npm vulnerability: nodemailer
findings.description: Nodemailer has SMTP command injection due to unsanitized `envelope.size` parameter. Run `npm audit fix` to remediate.

findings.title: npm vulnerability: qs
findings.description: qs's arrayLimit bypass in its bracket notation allows DoS via memory exhaustion. Run `npm audit fix` to remediate.

findings.title: npm vulnerability: request
findings.description: Server-Side Request Forgery in Request. Run `npm audit fix` to remediate.

findings.title: npm vulnerability: request-promise
findings.description: request. Run `npm audit fix` to remediate.

findings.title: npm vulnerability: request-promise-core
findings.description: request. Run `npm audit fix` to remediate.

findings.title: npm vulnerability: snoowrap
findings.description: request. Run `npm audit fix` to remediate.

findings.title: npm vulnerability: tough-cookie
findings.description: tough-cookie Prototype Pollution vulnerability. Run `npm audit fix` to remediate.

findings.title: npm vulnerability: ws
findings.description: ws affected by a DoS when handling a request with many HTTP headers. Run `npm audit fix` to remediate.
